transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I have 1 bowl of spicy seafood brisket noodles
I bought 3 orders of 2-3 servings
And here we have fried pork with sweet & sour sauce, And menbosha (fried shrimp toast)
Bon appetit
The color is super red
Let's try the soup first
This calls for some white rice
The smoky flavor is insane
So tasty
The noodles are very tasty
Fried pork
It's very crispy and chewy
Menbosha
Let's take some brisket

The smoky flavor is too overwhelming
That's no joke
Delicious though
Crab
Webfoot octopus
Cute
Shrimp
Mussel
Put on top
Fried pork
The noodles are too heavy Do I need to bring a tong?
It's not salty
It's not spicy. Well, kinda I think it will get spicy soon
I don't really care about how the fried pork is eaten (dip or pour sauce) I just eat it
Soup
It's really red

It's the color of hell
That's amazing
Yummy
Webfoot octopus
The noodles didn't get bloated It just comes like this
I take a long time to eat, so I like these noodles
[Viewer: Eat some braised chicken] I'm not too good at eating chicken
And I don't know why I don't crave it
The noodles are too heavy
It's splashing everywhere
White rice would go so well in here
I like to eat it with rice too
The only problem is that I would need like 10 bowls of rice to get the ratio correct
Everything about this looks super-sized
It's getting everywhere
I'm not sure where the scallop meat went I only have the shells

Lifting up the noodles is like lifting up a barbell
Tong
That's so much better
Nevermind
It's about the same
The noodles? I bought 3 orders of the 2-3 servings
I don't think it was 2 servings
I would say 2.5~3 servings per order
It could take 3 people to eat 1 order
Let's eat some mussel
[Viewer: It looks like you're bleeding]
I'm not
Almost all noodle restaurants have the brisket one now
The smoky flavor is nice
That's spicy
That's spicy

I'm not talking much because of it
I want to eat some shaved ice
I'll just pick out the big vegetables
Like this
This
Thank you for the donations
Look at my lips
Don't drink the soup?
It's fine
I don't really eat that much soup anymore
I'll be alright
It's hot
I keep bleeding!
Why am I like this today?
I'm not a messy eater
It's not an illusion It's a really big bowl of noodles

Thank you for the donations
I wish I was good at eating vegetables
That would be awesome
Webfoot octopus! He has a big head
This is..
It's scallop!
I found it
I found the scallop meat
Almost thought I got scammed
Why are they all vegetables?
I can't eat that
Why does it look like this?
Let's eat some ice cream
The soup is tasty
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
